shot_notes: Carter enters the large ancient chamber
evidence_summary: Establish the transition from a terrestrial mountain setting to a supernatural interior through a controlled lighting shift and character physical decline.

Carter's horse leads him to a narrow cave entrance on a high trail. After checking Powell, Carter enters the large, ancient chamber. Inside, he is overcome by an unnatural drowsiness and collapses into unconsciousness.
Bright daylight on a high cliffside trail with horse movement.
Darkness/dim light as the protagonist lies unconscious in the chamber.
Carter follows his horse into the cave and succumbs to unnatural lethargy.
